languages.text: "Нет нужды беспокоиться, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Приказ привести Янус к покорности отдал я, ибо этот мир нуждался в твердой руке Вольного Торговца".
"There is no cause for concern, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."
languages.original_text: "Нет нужды беспокоиться, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Приказ привести Янус к покорности отдал я, ибо этот мир нуждался в твердой руке Вольного Торговца".

traits.locale_text: "There is no cause for concern, heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."
"There is no cause for concern, heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."
"There is no cause for concern, heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."
"There is no cause for concern, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

languages.text: «No hay motivos para preocuparse, {mf|heredero|heredera}. Fui yo quien impartió la orden de someter Janus, pues la situación requería la mano firme de un Comerciante Independiente».
languages.original_text: "There is no cause for concern, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

traits.locale_text: «No hay motivos para preocuparse, {mf|heredero|heredera}. Fui yo quien impartió la orden de someter Janus, pues la situación requería la mano firme de un Comerciante Independiente».

languages.text: “没什么好担心的，我的继承人。是我下令镇压加努斯的。那个世界需要行商浪人的铁腕统治。”
languages.original_text: "There is no cause for concern, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

traits.locale_text: “没什么好担心的，我的继承人。是我下令镇压加努斯的。那个世界需要行商浪人的铁腕统治。”

languages.text: « Inutile de vous alarmer, {mf|héritier|héritière}. C'est moi qui ai donné l'ordre de mater les rebelles de Janus, et pour cause, ce monde avait grand besoin de la poigne de fer du libre-marchand. »
languages.original_text: "There is no cause for concern, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

traits.locale_text: « Inutile de vous alarmer, {mf|héritier|héritière}. C'est moi qui ai donné l'ordre de mater les rebelles de Janus, et pour cause, ce monde avait grand besoin de la poigne de fer du libre-marchand. »

languages.text: "Endişelenmene gerek yok vârisim. Janus'u dize getirme emrini ben verdim. O dünyanın hizaya getirilmeye ihtiyacı vardı."
languages.original_text: "There is no cause for concern, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

traits.locale_text: "Endişelenmene gerek yok vârisim. Janus'u dize getirme emrini ben verdim. O dünyanın hizaya getirilmeye ihtiyacı vardı."

languages.text: 「心配する必要はありません、私の後継者。ジャヌスを従わせる命令は、私が下したものです。その世界には、ローグトレーダーの確固たる手が必要だったのです。」
languages.original_text: "There is no cause for concern, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

traits.locale_text: 「心配する必要はありません、私の後継者。ジャヌスを従わせる命令は、私が下したものです。その世界には、ローグトレーダーの確固たる手が必要だったのです。」

languages.text: "Es gibt keinen Grund zur Sorge, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Der Befehl, Janus gefügig zu machen, kam von mir, denn diese Welt bedurfte der harten Hand des Freihändlers."
languages.original_text: "There is no cause for concern, heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

traits.locale_text: "Es gibt keinen Grund zur Sorge, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Der Befehl, Janus gefügig zu machen, kam von mir, denn diese Welt bedurfte der harten Hand des Freihändlers."
